metadata.lyrics:
[00:32.50] She wakes up early every morning
[00:35.13] Just to do her hair now
[00:37.60] Because she cares, yeah
[00:40.42] Her day, oh, wouldn't be right
[00:42.93] Without her make up
[00:45.64] She's never had a make up
[00:48.44] She's just like you and me
[00:51.11] But she's homeless, she's homeless
[00:56.76] As she stands there singing for money
[00:59.78] La da dee, la dee da
